data.body:
Goal:
Rename the beat_ids field to knot_ids on ExecutionPlanStep, ExecutionPlanWave, and the top-level ExecutionPlanData struct in src/domain/execution_plan.rs. The term "beat" is a Foolery-only abstraction and should not appear in the Knots domain model. Foolery must translate beat_id to knot_id at the payload boundary when writing to Knots.

Verification:
1. grep -r beat_id src/ returns zero hits.
2. kno show --json on an execution_plan knot emits knot_ids (not beat_ids) in the execution_plan payload.
3. Existing tests pass after the rename — update test fixtures that use "beat-1" literals.
4. Snapshot, sync, and rehydrate round-trips preserve the renamed field.

Constraints:
- Add a migration/compat path if the on-disk event log already contains beat_ids keys (deserialize both, serialize only knot_ids).
- Do not rename anything in the Foolery codebase — that repo owns the beat abstraction and translates at the boundary.
data.title: Rename beat_ids to knot_ids in ExecutionPlanData domain types
